We document that, while improving local biodiversity, the initiative led to a significant increase in bond yields for Chinese municipalities with national nature reserves. Evidence suggests that these effects are driven by expected increases in transition costs resulting from shutting down illegal economic activities within reserves and local public spending on biodiversity following the initiative. Overall, our results indicate that investors show little consideration beyond financial payoffs towards endeavors counteracting biodiversity loss.
32743.zh_abstract: 生物多样性丧失的速度要求保护工作发生根本性转变，而这将带来巨大成本。我们利用中国中央政府于2017年发起的“绿盾行动”（一项旨在执行国家级自然保护区生物多样性保护规则的重大监管举措），研究了金融市场如何为这类保护成本定价。我们记录到，尽管该举措改善了当地生物多样性，但它导致拥有国家级自然保护区的中国市政债券收益率显著上升。证据表明，这些影响是由预期转型成本增加所驱动的，这些成本源于关闭保护区内非法经济活动以及该举措后地方在生物多样性上的公共支出。总体而言，我们的结果表明，投资者在应对生物多样性丧失的努力中，除了财务回报外几乎不考虑其他因素。

32742.title: Intergenerational Impacts of Secondary Education: Experimental Evidence from Ghana
32742.zh_title: 中等教育的代际影响：来自加纳的实验证据
32742.authors: Esther Duflo, Pascaline Dupas, Elizabeth Spelke, Mark P. Walsh
32742.abstract: We provide experimental evidence on the intergenerational impacts of secondary education subsidies in a low-income context, leveraging a randomized controlled trial and 15-year longitudinal follow-up. For young women, receiving a scholarship for secondary school delays childbearing and marriage, and reduces unwanted pregnancies. Female scholarship recipients are more likely to marry a partner with tertiary education and their children have better early childhood development outcomes. In particular, we document a 45% reduction in under-three mortality as well as cognitive development gains of 0.25 standard deviations of test scores once children are of school age. The primary mechanism seems to be that more-educated caregivers have the knowledge and skills to safeguard their children’s health and stimulate their cognitive development. In contrast, we find no evidence of a positive impact for the children of male scholarship recipients, who tend to marry less educated partners. Together, these results suggest a key role for maternal education in child outcomes. We also estimate the cost-benefit ratio for secondary school scholarships and find that the impact on child survival alone is sufficient to make them a highly cost-effective investment.
32742.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项随机对照试验和15年的纵向追踪数据，提供了低收入背景下中等教育补贴代际影响的实验证据。对于年轻女性而言，获得中学奖学金会推迟生育和结婚，并减少意外怀孕。获得奖学金的女性更有可能与接受高等教育的伴侣结婚，她们的孩子在早期儿童发展方面表现更好。具体而言，我们记录了3岁以下儿童死亡率降低45%，以及当孩子达到学龄时，认知发展测试分数提高0.25个标准差。主要机制似乎是，受教育程度更高的照护者拥有保护子女健康和刺激其认知发展的知识和技能。相比之下，我们没有发现男性奖学金获得者子女受到积极影响的证据，这些男性往往与受教育程度较低的伴侣结婚。这些结果共同表明，母亲教育在子女结果中起着关键作用。我们还估算了中学奖学金的成本效益比，发现仅对儿童生存的影响就足以使其成为一项极具成本效益的投资。

32741.title: Regulating the Direction of Innovation
32741.abstract: This paper examines the regulation of technological innovation direction under uncertainty about potential harms. We develop a model with two competing technological paths and analyze various regulatory interventions. The optimal regulatory approach depends critically on the magnitude of potential harm relative to technological benefits. Our analysis reveals a motive to double down on harmful technologies in resource allocation across research paths, challenging common intuitions about diversification. We demonstrate that ex post regulatory instruments, particularly liability regimes, outperform ex ante restrictions in many scenarios. These insights have important implications for regulating emerging technologies like artificial intelligence, suggesting the need for informationally-responsive regulatory frameworks.
32741.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在潜在危害不确定的情况下对技术创新方向的监管。我们构建了一个包含两条竞争性技术路径的模型，并分析了各种监管干预措施。最优监管方法关键取决于潜在危害相对于技术收益的大小。我们的分析揭示了一种在跨研究路径的资源分配中加倍投入有害技术的动机，这挑战了关于多样化的常见直觉。我们证明，事后监管工具，特别是责任制度，在许多情况下优于事前限制。这些见解对监管人工智能等新兴技术具有重要意义，表明需要信息响应型监管框架。

32740.title: Worker Representatives
32740.authors: Julian Budde, Thomas Dohmen, Simon Jäger, Simon Trenkle
32740.abstract: We study the descriptive and substantive representation of workers through worker representatives, focusing on the selection of German works council representatives and their impact on worker outcomes. Becoming a professional representative leads to substantial wage gains for the elected, concentrated among blue-collar workers. Representatives are positively selected in terms of pre-election earnings and person fixed effects. They are more likely to have undergone vocational training, show greater interest in politics, and lean left politically compared to the employees they represent; blue-collar workers are close to proportionally represented among works councilors. Drawing on a retirement-IV strategy and event-study designs around council elections, we find that blue-collar representatives reduce involuntary separations, consistent with blue-collar workers placing stronger emphasis on job security
32740.zh_abstract: 我们研究了通过工人代表实现的工人描述性代表和实质性代表，重点关注德国劳资委员会代表的选拔及其对工人结果的影响。成为专业代表会为当选者带来可观的工资增长，这主要集中在蓝领工人中。代表在选举前收入和个体固定效应方面呈现正向选择。与他们所代表的员工相比，他们更有可能接受过职业培训，对政治表现出更大兴趣，并在政治上偏左；蓝领工人在劳资委员会中的比例接近其实际比例。利用退休工具变量策略和围绕委员会选举的事件研究设计，我们发现蓝领代表减少了非自愿离职，这与蓝领工人更强调工作保障是一致的。
32740.meta: Programs：AG, CF, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：J5, J51, J54, J63, P12, P13

32739.title: Rising Markups and the Role of Consumer Preferences
32739.zh_title: 加价上升与消费者偏好的作用
32739.authors: Hendrik Döpper, Alexander MacKay, Nathan H. Miller, Joel Stiebale
32739.abstract: We characterize the evolution of markups for consumer products in the United States from 2006 to 2019. Using detailed data on prices and quantities for products in more than 100 distinct product categories, we estimate flexible demand systems and recover markups under an assumption that firms set prices to maximize profit. Our empirical strategy obtains a panel of consumer preferences and marginal costs based on the estimation of separate random coefficient models by category and year. We find that markups increased by about 30 percent on average over the sample period. The change is primarily attributable to decreases in marginal costs, as real prices only increased slightly from 2006 to 2019. Our estimates indicate that consumers have become less price sensitive over time.
32739.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了2006年至2019年美国消费品加价的演变。利用超过100个不同产品类别中产品和数量的详细数据，我们估计了灵活的需求系统，并在假设企业以利润最大化为目标定价的前提下恢复了加价。我们的实证策略基于按类别和年份分别估计随机系数模型，获得了消费者偏好和边际成本的面板数据。我们发现，在样本期内，加价平均增加了约30%。这一变化主要归因于边际成本的下降，因为实际价格从2006年到2019年仅略有上涨。我们的估计表明，消费者对价格的敏感度随时间推移而降低。

32738.title: Servicing Development: Productive Upgrading of Labor-Absorbing Services in Developing Economies
32738.zh_title: 服务发展：发展中经济体中劳动力吸收型服务的生产性升级
32738.abstract: Manufacturing generates very little employment in the developing world. Urban jobs are predominantly informal, unproductive, and in services. It seems unlikely that manufacturing will be able to absorb the new increments to the labor force or create more productive jobs for those that are already stuck in petty services. Raising productivity in services has been traditionally difficult, but is now necessary to achieve long-term growth in the standard of living. We discuss and provide evidence for four broad strategies: (a) incentivizing large, productive firms to expand their employment; (b) enhancing productive capabilities of smaller firms through the provision of public inputs; (c) providing workers or firms technologies that explicitly complement low-skill labor; (d) vocational training with “wrap-around” services to enhance job seekers’ employability, job retention, and eventual promotion.
32738.zh_abstract: 制造业在发展中国家创造的就业机会非常少。城市工作岗位主要是非正规的、低生产率的，并且集中在服务业。制造业似乎不太可能吸收新增劳动力，或为那些已陷入低端服务业的人创造更多生产性岗位。提高服务业生产率传统上很困难，但现在对于实现生活水平的长期增长是必要的。我们讨论并提供了四种广泛策略的证据：（a）激励大型、高生产率企业扩大就业；（b）通过提供公共投入来增强小型企业的生产能力；（c）向工人或企业提供明确补充低技能劳动力的技术；（d）提供附带“全方位”服务的职业培训，以提高求职者的就业能力、工作保留率和最终晋升机会。

32737.title: Tax Incentives for Charitable Giving: New Findings from the TCJA
32737.zh_title: 慈善捐赠的税收激励：来自《减税与就业法案》的新发现
32737.authors: Xiao Han, Daniel M. Hungerman, Mark Ottoni-Wilhelm
32737.abstract: The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act eliminated federal charitable giving incentives for roughly 20 percent of US income-tax payers. We study the impact of this on giving. Basic theory and our empirical results suggest heterogeneous effects for taxpayers with different amounts of itemizable expenses. Overall, the reform decreased charitable giving by about $\$20$ billion annually. Using a new method to adjust estimates for retimed giving, we find evidence of moderate intertemporal shifts from pre-announcement of the law. The permanent price elasticity of giving estimates range from .6 for the average donor to over 2 for those predicted to be most responsive to the reform.
32737.zh_abstract: 《减税与就业法案》取消了约20%美国所得税纳税人的联邦慈善捐赠激励。我们研究了这一变化对捐赠的影响。基础理论和我们的实证结果表明，对于拥有不同可逐项扣除费用金额的纳税人，其影响存在异质性。总体而言，该改革使慈善捐赠每年减少约200亿美元。使用一种调整捐赠时间重新安排估计值的新方法，我们发现了法律预公告导致适度跨期转移的证据。捐赠的永久价格弹性估计值范围从普通捐赠者的0.6到那些预计对改革反应最强烈者的2以上。

32736.title: Pace of Adoption of Alternatives to Animal-Source Foods and Climate Goals
32736.zh_title: 动物源食品替代品的采用速度与气候目标
32736.authors: Galina Hale, Vlad Onescu, Ritesh Bhangale
32736.abstract: The global food system is an important contributor to greenhouse gas emissions that lead to climate change. Animal agriculture is responsible for a large share of the food-system emissions, both directly and through the production of animal feed. Limiting global warming to the goals set forth by the international community will not be possible without rapid phasing out of a substantial share of animal-source food. We show that the rapid adoption of alternatives to animal-source foods, such as plant-only diet, or plant-based, cultured, or fermentation-derived analogs to animal products, can be consistent with climate goals. Importantly, the longer the delay in the adoption of alternatives, the larger the share of diet they will have to represent in 2050 for the food system to stay within its carbon budget.
32736.zh_abstract: 全球粮食系统是导致气候变化的重要温室气体排放源。畜牧业直接或通过动物饲料生产，对粮食系统排放负有较大责任。如果不迅速淘汰大部分动物源食品，将全球变暖限制在国际社会设定的目标之内将不可能实现。我们表明，快速采用动物源食品替代品，例如纯植物饮食，或基于植物、培养或发酵衍生的动物产品类似物，可以与气候目标保持一致。重要的是，采用替代品的延迟时间越长，到2050年它们在饮食中所占份额就必须越大，才能使粮食系统保持在碳预算之内。

32735.title: Family Planning, Now and Later: Infertility Fears and Contraceptive Take-Up
32735.zh_title: 计划生育：现在与未来——不孕恐惧与避孕措施采用
32735.authors: Natalie Bau, David J. Henning, Corinne Low, Bryce Steinberg
32735.abstract: Early fertility is thought to be one of the key barriers to female human capital attainment in sub-Saharan Africa, yet contraceptive take-up remains puzzlingly low among women in critical periods for human capital investment. We study a barrier to hormonal contraceptive uptake among young, nulliparious women that, while recognized in the qualitative literature, has not been causally tested: the persistent (incorrect) belief — grounded in medical mistrust and an adverse history of population control policies — that these contraceptives cause later infertility. This belief creates a perceived tradeoff between current and future reproductive control. We use a randomized controlled trial with female undergraduates at the flagship university in Zambia to test two interventions to increase contraceptive use. Despite high rates of sexual activity, low rates of condom-use, and near zero desire for current pregnancy, only 5% of this population uses hormonal contraceptives at baseline. Providing a voucher to visit a local clinic — greatly reducing access costs — only temporarily increases contraceptive use. However, pairing this transfer with a carefully-designed treatment to change persistent incorrect beliefs that contraceptives cause infertility doubles the initial effect, persistently increases contraceptive take-up over 6 months, and reduces reported pregnancies by as much as 71%. This treatment reduces self-reports that contraceptives cause infertility, and compliers are more likely to cite fear of infertility as the reason for not using contraceptives at baseline. IV estimates indicate that eliminating the belief that contraceptives cause infertility would more than triple contraceptive use.
32735.zh_abstract: 早期生育被认为是撒哈拉以南非洲女性人力资本积累的关键障碍之一，然而在人力资本投资关键时期的女性中，避孕措施采用率仍然低得令人费解。我们研究了年轻未育女性采用激素避孕的一个障碍，该障碍在定性文献中已得到认可，但尚未经过因果检验：一种持续存在的（错误）信念——基于医疗不信任和人口控制政策的不利历史——认为这些避孕措施会导致日后不孕。这种信念造成了当前生育控制与未来生育控制之间的感知权衡。我们利用在赞比亚旗舰大学对女本科生进行的一项随机对照试验，测试了两种旨在提高避孕措施使用率的干预措施。尽管性活跃率高、安全套使用率低且当前怀孕意愿近乎为零，但该人群中只有5%在基线时使用激素避孕。提供前往当地诊所的优惠券——大幅降低了获取成本——仅能暂时提高避孕措施使用率。然而，将这种转移支付与一项精心设计的、旨在改变避孕措施导致不孕这一持续错误信念的治疗相结合，会使初始效果翻倍，在6个月内持续提高避孕措施采用率，并将报告怀孕率降低高达71%。这种治疗减少了自我报告认为避孕措施导致不孕的情况，并且依从者在基线时更可能将不孕恐惧列为不使用避孕措施的原因。工具变量估计表明，消除避孕措施导致不孕的信念将使避孕措施使用率增加两倍以上。
32735.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, LS；JEL：I10, I12, J10, J13, O10, O12

32795.title: Privatization's Impacts on State-Owned Enterprises: A Tale of Zombie versus Healthy Firms
32795.zh_title: 私有化对国有企业的影响：僵尸企业与健康企业之比较
32795.authors: Ruiting Wang, Xue Wang, Gang Xu, Tao Zha
32795.abstract: We estimate the effects of privatization on zombie versus healthy state-owned enterprises (SOEs) in China, extending our analysis beyond TFP to a broad array of financial and economic indicators. Privatizing zombie SOEs enhances labor productivity and TFP, reduces bank and government subsidies, alleviates leverage and administrative expenses, improves liquidity, boosts profits, and accelerates sales growth. These benefits are more pronounced than for healthy SOEs and are robust across regions and industries. Our findings offer policy implications for emerging markets, suggesting that prioritizing the privatization of underperforming, zombie-like entities can lead to substantial economic improvements and greater efficiency.
32795.zh_abstract: 我们估计了私有化对中国僵尸企业与健康国有企业的影响，将分析范围从全要素生产率扩展到一系列广泛的金融和经济指标。私有化僵尸国有企业提高了劳动生产率和全要素生产率，减少了银行和政府补贴，降低了杠杆率和行政费用，改善了流动性，增加了利润，并加速了销售增长。这些益处比健康国有企业更为显著，并且在地区和行业间具有稳健性。我们的研究结果为新兴市场提供了政策启示，表明优先对表现不佳的僵尸类实体进行私有化可以带来显著的经济改善和更高的效率。
32795.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IO；JEL：D22, L21, L33, P31

32794.title: Reducing Emissions and Air Pollution from the Informal Sector: Evidence from Bangladesh
32794.zh_title: 减少非正规部门的排放与空气污染：来自孟加拉国的证据
32794.authors: Nina R. Brooks, Debashish Biswas, Sameer Maithel, Grant Miller, Aprajit Mahajan, M. Rofi Uddin, Shoeb Ahmed, Moogdho Mahzab, Mahbubur Rahman, Stephen P. Luby
32794.abstract: We present results from a randomized controlled trial in Bangladesh that introduced operational practices to improve energy efficiency and reduce emissions in 276 “zigzag” brick kilns. 65% of intervention kilns adopted the improved practices. Treatment assignment reduced energy use by 10.5% (p-value<0.001) and decreased CO₂ and PM₂.₅ emissions by 171 metric tons and 0.45 metric tons, respectively, per kiln per year. Valuing the CO₂ reductions using a social cost of carbon of $\$185$/MT, we find that the social benefits outweigh costs by a factor of 65 to 1. The intervention, which required no new capital investment, also decreased fuel costs and increased brick quality. Our results demonstrate the potential for privately profitable, as well as publicly beneficial, improvements to address environmental problems in informal industries.
32794.zh_abstract: 我们展示了一项在孟加拉国进行的随机对照试验的结果，该试验引入了操作实践以提高276座“之字形”砖窑的能源效率并减少排放。65%的干预组砖窑采用了改进后的实践。处理分配使能源使用量减少了10.5%（p值<0.001），并使每座砖窑每年的二氧化碳和PM₂.₅排放量分别减少了171公吨和0.45公吨。使用185美元/公吨的社会碳成本对二氧化碳减排进行估值，我们发现社会效益超过成本的比例为65比1。该干预措施无需新的资本投资，还降低了燃料成本并提高了砖块质量。我们的结果证明了在非正规行业中，既有私人盈利潜力又有公共益处的改进措施能够解决环境问题。
32794.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：D22, L6, O1, O14, Q56

32793.title: Labor Unions and Social Insurance
32793.authors: Naoki Aizawa, Hanming Fang, Katsuhiro Komatsu
32793.abstract: The United States has experienced a significant decline in labor unions over the past half-century. We examine the aggregate labor market impact of labor unions, the causes of their decline, and their welfare and distributional consequences, accounting for unions’ effects on wages and employers’ insurance provisions. We first provide descriptive evidence that social insurance expansions contribute to the union’s decline. We then develop and estimate an equilibrium labor search model where unionization, wages, employers’ insurance provisions, and job security are endogenously determined. We find that, while skill-biased technological changes and Right-to-Work laws respectively explain 32% and 7% of the union decline from 1955 to 2019, social insurance expansions account for 15%. Our analysis also indicates that social insurance expansion can affect inequality through (de)unionization, and inequality may increase or decrease depending on how social insurance is targeted. Subsidizing unions lowers overall social welfare but increases the welfare of low-skilled workers.
32793.zh_abstract: 在过去半个世纪中，美国的工会经历了显著衰落。我们考察了工会对总体劳动力市场的影响、其衰落的原因以及福利和分配后果，同时考虑了工会对工资和雇主保险提供的影响。我们首先提供描述性证据，表明社会保险扩张促进了工会的衰落。随后，我们构建并估计了一个均衡劳动力搜索模型，其中工会化、工资、雇主保险提供和工作保障是内生决定的。我们发现，虽然技能偏向的技术变革和“工作权利法”分别解释了1955年至2019年工会衰落的32%和7%，但社会保险扩张解释了15%。我们的分析还表明，社会保险扩张可以通过（去）工会化影响不平等，而不平等可能增加或减少取决于社会保险的瞄准方式。补贴工会降低了整体社会福利，但提高了低技能工人的福利。
32793.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：I13, J42, J51, J52

32792.title: Political Polarization and Finance
32792.abstract: We review an empirical literature that studies how political polarization affects financial decisions. We first discuss the degree of partisan segregation in finance and corporate America, the mechanisms through which partisanship may influence financial decisions, and available data sources to infer individuals' partisan leanings. We then describe and discuss the empirical evidence. Our review suggests an economically large and often growing partisan gap in the financial decisions of households, corporate executives, and financial intermediaries. Partisan alignment between individuals explains team and financial relationship formation, with initial evidence suggesting that high levels of partisan homogeneity may be associated with economic costs. We conclude by proposing several promising directions for future research.
32792.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了研究政治极化如何影响金融决策的实证文献。我们首先讨论了金融界和美国企业界的党派隔离程度、党派倾向可能影响金融决策的机制，以及可用于推断个人党派倾向的数据来源。然后，我们描述并讨论了实证证据。我们的综述表明，在家庭、企业高管和金融中介的金融决策中，存在经济上显著且通常日益扩大的党派差距。个人之间的党派一致性解释了团队和金融关系的形成，初步证据表明高水平的党派同质性可能与经济成本相关。最后，我们提出了未来研究的几个有前景的方向。

32791.title: Consumer Credit Reporting Data
32791.authors: Christa N. Gibbs, Benedict Guttman-Kenney, Donghoon Lee, Scott T. Nelson, Wilbert H. van der Klaauw, Jialan Wang
32791.abstract: Since the 2000s, economists across fields have increasingly used consumer credit reporting data for research. We introduce readers to the economics of and the institutional details of these data. Using examples from the literature, we provide practical guidance on how to use these data to construct economic measures of borrowing, consumption, credit access, financial distress, and geographic mobility. We explain what credit scores measure, and why. We highlight how researchers can access credit reporting data via existing datasets or by creating new datasets, including by linking credit reporting data with surveys and external datasets.
32791.zh_abstract: 自2000年代以来，各领域的经济学家越来越多地使用消费者信用报告数据进行研究。我们向读者介绍这些数据的经济学原理和制度细节。利用文献中的例子，我们提供了关于如何使用这些数据构建借贷、消费、信贷获取、财务困境和地理流动性等经济指标的实用指导。我们解释了信用评分衡量什么以及为什么。我们强调了研究人员如何通过现有数据集或创建新数据集（包括将信用报告数据与调查和外部数据集链接）来获取信用报告数据。
32791.meta: Programs：AG, CF, ED, EH, LE, ME, PE；JEL：D10, D82, E21, G50, H31

32790.title: Contracting over Pharmaceutical Formularies and Rebates
32790.zh_title: 药品处方集与返利合同
32790.abstract: We investigate how formularies used by pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs) can affect manufacturer rebates for branded drugs. We first present a theoretical model of multidimensional contracting in which a PBM negotiates with drug manufacturers over menus of formulary-contingent rebate payments and then selects a formulary. We then estimate how formulary placement affects drug demand for statins using data from Princeton University, a large employer that contracts with a single PBM to offer prescription drug coverage to its employees. Using our theoretical model and demand estimates, we predict how rebates are affected by the use of a preferred tier in the formulary or the ability to exclude a drug from coverage. Our predictions align with aggregate rebate data, and we find that allowing a PBM to place branded drugs on preferred and non-preferred tiers can substantially increase negotiated rebate payments.
32790.zh_abstract: 我们研究了药品福利管理公司（PBM）使用的处方集如何影响品牌药的制造商返利。我们首先提出了一个多维合同理论模型，其中PBM与药品制造商就一系列基于处方集的返利支付菜单进行谈判，然后选择处方集。接着，我们利用普林斯顿大学的数据（该大学是一家大型雇主，与单一PBM签约为其员工提供处方药保险）估计了处方集位置如何影响他汀类药物的需求。利用我们的理论模型和需求估计，我们预测了在处方集中使用优先层级或排除某种药物覆盖如何影响返利。我们的预测与总体返利数据一致，我们发现允许PBM将品牌药置于优先和非优先层级可以显著增加谈判达成的返利支付。

32789.title: Imagine your Life at 25: Gender Conformity and Later-Life Outcomes
32789.zh_title: 想象你25岁的生活：性别顺从与后期生活结果
32789.authors: Sreevidya Ayyar, Uta Bolt, Eric French, Cormac O'Dea
32789.abstract: Using thousands of essays written by 11-year-olds in 1969, we construct an index measuring children’s conformity to gender norms. We link this index to outcomes over the life-cycle. Conditional on age-11 covariates, a one standard deviation increase in our index predicts a 4% decline in lifetime earnings for girls, associated with lower wages and fewer hours worked. We find no statistically significant association for boys. Education, occupation, and family formation account for 40% of the earnings decline observed among girls.
32789.zh_abstract: 利用1969年11岁儿童撰写的数千篇作文，我们构建了一个衡量儿童对性别规范顺从程度的指数。我们将该指数与生命周期内的结果联系起来。在控制了11岁时的协变量后，该指数每增加一个标准差，预测女孩的终生收入下降4%，这与较低的工资和较少的工作时间相关。我们发现男孩没有统计学上显著的关联。教育、职业和家庭形成解释了女孩收入下降的40%。

32788.title: Doctor Decision Making and Patient Outcomes
32788.authors: Janet Currie, W. Bentley MacLeod, Kate Musen
32788.abstract: Doctors often treat similar patients differently, which affects health outcomes and medical spending. We assess the recent literature on doctor decision making through the lens of a model that incorporates diagnostic and procedural skills, beliefs, incentives, and differences in patient pools. Decision making is affected by beliefs, training, experience, peer effects, financial incentives, and time constraints. Interventions to improve decision making include providing information, guidelines, and technologies like electronic medical records and algorithmic decision tools. Economists have made progress in understanding doctor decision making, but applications of that knowledge to improving health care are still limited.
32788.zh_abstract: 医生经常对相似的患者采取不同的治疗方式，这会影响健康结果和医疗支出。我们通过一个包含诊断和程序技能、信念、激励以及患者群体差异的模型，评估了关于医生决策的最新文献。决策受到信念、培训、经验、同伴效应、财务激励和时间限制的影响。改善决策的干预措施包括提供信息、指南以及电子病历和算法决策工具等技术。经济学家在理解医生决策方面取得了进展，但将这些知识应用于改善医疗保健仍然有限。

32787.title: Innovation Adoption by Committee: Evaluating Decision-Making in the FDA
32787.zh_title: 委员会采纳创新：评估FDA的决策制定
32787.abstract: The FDA is responsible for the approval of new drugs, biological products and medical devices in the United States. As part of the approval process, the FDA relies on advisory committees, which provide independent advice from outside experts. We combine a structural approach with newly collected data from meetings' transcripts to study the process of collective learning and policy recommendation in advisory committees. We quantify the effectiveness of advisory panels, and evaluate changes to its institutional framework. We find that deliberation significantly increases the accuracy of decision-making. Changes in deliberation rules or committee membership do not uniformly improve outcomes.
32787.zh_abstract: FDA负责美国新药、生物制品和医疗器械的批准。作为审批过程的一部分，FDA依赖咨询委员会，这些委员会提供外部专家的独立建议。我们结合结构方法和新收集的会议记录数据，研究咨询委员会中的集体学习和政策建议过程。我们量化了咨询小组的有效性，并评估了对其制度框架的变更。我们发现，审议显著提高了决策的准确性。审议规则或委员会成员构成的变更并不能统一改善结果。
32787.meta: Programs：EH, IO, POL；JEL：D02, D70, D72, D83, I18, P0

32786.title: Correlation in State and Local Tax Changes
32786.zh_title: 州和地方税收变化的相关性
32786.authors: Scott R. Baker, Pawel Janas, Lorenz Kueng
32786.abstract: Empirical research in public economics, including our own, often uses variation in state and local taxes as an empirical laboratory to estimate causal relationships. A key concern is that other taxes might change at the same time. To assess this concern, we develop a dataset of state (1977–2022) and local (2000–2022) tax rates and revenue from personal income, corporate income, property, sales, and excise taxes. This new dataset generates two key results. First, we find that taxes of different types tend to co-move within a jurisdiction: a tax change of one type can more than double the likelihood of a second tax type changing in the same year. Local tax changes also co-move with tax changes enacted by the state they are located in. This positive correlation can upwardly bias elasticity estimates, but only moderately. For example, regressing state economic outcomes on the full set of state tax changes yields elasticities that are about 10–30% smaller than those obtained from using a single tax type in isolation. Second, we document that the mix of taxes across state and local jurisdictions is very different, and that these differences have become more pronounced over time as jurisdictions have increasingly become reliant on the single tax type—sales, personal or corporate income tax—that was most prominent for them in the earliest part of our sample.
32786.zh_abstract: 公共经济学中的实证研究（包括我们自己的研究）经常利用州和地方税收的变化作为实证实验室来估计因果关系。一个关键问题是其他税收可能同时发生变化。为了评估这一担忧，我们开发了一个包含州（1977-2022年）和地方（2000-2022年）个人所得税、公司所得税、财产税、销售税和消费税税率及收入的数据集。这个新数据集产生了两个关键结果。首先，我们发现不同类型的税收在同一辖区内往往共同变动：一种税收类型的变化可以使第二种税收类型在同一年发生变化的可能性增加一倍以上。地方税收变化也与所在州实施的税收变化共同变动。这种正相关可能会向上偏差弹性估计，但幅度适中。例如，将州经济结果对所有州税收变化进行回归得到的弹性，比单独使用单一税收类型得到的弹性小约10-30%。其次，我们记录了州和地方辖区之间的税收组合非常不同，并且随着时间的推移，这些差异变得更加明显，因为辖区越来越依赖单一税收类型——销售税、个人所得税或公司所得税——这些类型在样本早期对它们最为突出。

32785.title: Firm Responses to Aggregate Shocks and Implications for Workers: Lessons from the Pandemic
32785.zh_title: 企业对总体冲击的反应及其对工人的影响：来自大流行的教训
32785.authors: Livia Alfonsi, Vittorio Bassi, Imran Rasul, Elena Spadini
32785.abstract: Developing countries frequently face aggregate shocks. We use the lens of the pandemic to understand how such shocks propagate through labor markets, from firm responses through to implications for workers. Our analysis uses a panel of Ugandan firms and workers, tracked with high frequency from 2012 to 2022. We find that firms’ response to the fall in product demand due to the pandemic was to reduce labor demand and change the skills composition of retained workers. Firms disproportionately laid off skilled employees, namely those that received vocational training (VT) before joining the firm, rather than lay off non-VT workers who instead are trained on-the-job. We calibrate a model of firm profits to assess the relevance of three mechanisms driving such VT-biased responses: laying off non-VT workers is more costly because future hires need to be trained on-the job, non-VT workers are socially tied to firm owners, and the demand for goods/services produced by VT workers falls more than for those produced by non-VT workers. We then study the impacts of firms’ VT-biased responses on workers’ labor market trajectories, exploiting the fact that we randomly assigned individuals to the offer of VT in 2013. We confirm that VT workers are more likely to be laid off early in the downturn, but document that VT workers remain resilient, with the returns to VT remaining positive over the downturn. The mechanisms driving VT workers resilience are the certifiability of their skills and their greater accumulation of sector-specific experience pre-pandemic, enabling them to switch firms in the same sector later in the downturn. Our findings provide new insights for low-income labor markets on firm responses to aggregate shocks and consequences for workers across the skills distribution.
32785.zh_abstract: 发展中国家经常面临总体冲击。我们以大流行的视角来理解这些冲击如何通过劳动力市场传导，从企业反应到对工人的影响。我们的分析使用了乌干达企业和工人的面板数据，从2012年到2022年进行高频追踪。我们发现，企业对大流行导致的产品需求下降的反应是减少劳动力需求并改变留用工人的技能构成。企业不成比例地解雇了熟练员工，即那些在加入企业前接受过职业培训（VT）的员工，而不是解雇非VT工人，这些工人反而在职接受培训。我们校准了一个企业利润模型，以评估驱动这种偏向VT反应的三种机制的相关性：解雇非VT工人成本更高，因为未来招聘需要在职培训；非VT工人在社会上与企业主有联系；以及VT工人生产的商品/服务需求下降幅度大于非VT工人生产的商品/服务。然后，我们研究了企业偏向VT的反应对工人劳动力市场轨迹的影响，利用了我们在2013年随机分配个人接受VT机会的事实。我们证实VT工人更有可能在衰退初期被解雇，但记录了VT工人保持韧性，VT的回报在整个衰退期间保持正值。驱动VT工人韧性的机制是其技能的可认证性以及他们在疫情前积累的更多特定行业经验，这使他们能够在衰退后期在同一行业的企业间转换。我们的发现为低收入劳动力市场提供了关于企业对总体冲击的反应以及技能分布上工人后果的新见解。

32784.title: The Impact of Unconditional Cash Transfers on Consumption and Household Balance Sheets: Experimental Evidence from Two US States
32784.zh_title: 无条件现金转移对消费和家庭资产负债表的影响：来自美国两个州的实验证据
32784.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Elizabeth Rhodes, David E. Broockman, Patrick K. Krause, Sarah Miller, Eva Vivalt
32784.abstract: We provide new evidence on the causal effect of unearned income on consumption, balance sheets, and financial outcomes by exploiting an experiment that randomly assigned 1000 individ-uals to receive $\$1000$ per month and 2000 individuals to receive $\$50$ per month for three years. The transfer increased measured household expenditures by at least $\$300$ per month. The spending im-pact is positive in most categories, and is largest for housing, food, and car expenses. The treatment increases housing unit and neighborhood mobility. We find noisily estimated modest positive ef-fects on asset values, driven by financial assets, but these gains are offset by higher debt, resulting in a near-zero effect on net worth. The transfer increased self-reported financial health and credit scores but did not affect credit limits, delinquencies, utilization, bankruptcies, or foreclosures. Ad-justing for underreporting, we estimate marginal propensities to spend on non-durables between 0.38 and 0.50, on durables and semi-durables between 0.18 and 0.24, and marginal propensities to de-lever of near zero. These results suggest that large temporary transfers increase short-term con-sumption and improve financial health but may not cause persistent improvements in the financial position of young, low-income households.
32784.zh_abstract: 我们通过利用一项实验提供了关于非劳动收入对消费、资产负债表和财务结果因果效应的新证据，该实验随机分配1000人每月获得1000美元，2000人每月获得50美元，为期三年。转移支付使衡量的家庭支出每月至少增加了300美元。大多数类别的支出影响都是正的，其中住房、食品和汽车支出的影响最大。处理增加了住房单元和社区流动性。我们发现资产价值有噪声估计的适度正效应，由金融资产驱动，但这些收益被更高的债务所抵消，导致净资产效应接近于零。转移支付提高了自我报告的财务健康和信用评分，但没有影响信用额度、违约、利用率、破产或止赎。在调整了低报后，我们估计非耐用品支出的边际倾向在0.38到0.50之间，耐用品和半耐用品在0.18到0.24之间，去杠杆化的边际倾向接近于零。这些结果表明，大规模临时转移支付增加了短期消费并改善了财务健康，但可能不会导致年轻低收入家庭财务状况的持续改善。

32782.title: Accounting for Nonresponse in Election Polls: Total Margin of Error
32782.zh_title: 选举民调中无应答的核算：总误差幅度
32782.abstract: The potential impact of nonresponse on election polls is well known and frequently acknowledged. Yet measurement and reporting of polling error has focused solely on sampling error, represented by the margin of error of a poll. Survey statisticians have long recommended measurement of the total survey error of a sample estimate by its mean square error (MSE), which jointly measures sampling and non-sampling errors. Extending the conventional language of polling, we think it reasonable to use the square root of maximum MSE to measure the total margin of error (TME). This paper demonstrates how to measure the potential impact of nonresponse using the concept of TME, which we suggest should be a standard feature in the reporting of election poll results. We first show how to jointly measure statistical imprecision and response bias when a pollster lacks any knowledge of the candidate preferences of non-responders. We then extend the analysis to settings where the pollster has partial knowledge that bounds the preferences of non-responders. In each setting, we derive the poll estimate that minimizes TME—a midpoint estimate—and compare it to a conventional poll estimate. We identify conditions under which the two estimates coincide, noting that the TME exceeds the margin of sampling error whenever the pollster has less than complete knowledge of the nature of nonresponse.
32782.zh_abstract: 无应答对选举民调的潜在影响众所周知且常被提及。然而，民调误差的测量和报告仅聚焦于抽样误差，以民调的误差幅度为代表。调查统计学家长期以来建议通过均方误差来测量样本估计的总调查误差，该指标联合测量了抽样误差和非抽样误差。沿用民调的常规语言，我们认为使用最大均方误差的平方根来测量总误差幅度是合理的。本文展示了如何利用总误差幅度的概念来测量无应答的潜在影响，我们建议这应成为选举民调结果报告中的标准特征。我们首先展示了当民调机构对无应答者的候选人偏好一无所知时，如何联合测量统计不精确性和应答偏差。然后，我们将分析扩展到民调机构拥有部分知识、从而能限定无应答者偏好的情境。在每种情境下，我们推导出使总误差幅度最小化的民调估计值——即中点估计——并将其与传统民调估计值进行比较。我们识别出两种估计值一致的条件，并指出只要民调机构对无应答性质的认识不完全，总误差幅度就会超过抽样误差幅度。

32781.title: Household Mobility and Mortgage Rate Lock
32781.zh_title: 家庭流动性与抵押贷款利率锁定
32781.abstract: Rising interest rates can create “mortgage rate lock” for homeowners with fixed rate mortgages, who can hold onto their low rates as long as they stay in their homes but would have to take on new mortgages with higher rates if they moved. We show mobility rates fell in 2022 and 2023 for homeowners with mortgages, as market rates rose. We observe both absolute declines and declines relative to homeowners without mortgages, who are unaffected by mortgage rate lock. Mobility declines are not explained by changes in home values. Overall, our estimates imply that rising interest rates reduced mobility in 2022 and 2023 for households with mortgages by 16% and caused $\$20$ billion of deadweight loss.
32781.zh_abstract: 利率上升可能对拥有固定利率抵押贷款的房主造成“抵押贷款利率锁定”，只要他们留在现有住房中，就能维持低利率，但如果搬家，则必须承担利率更高的新抵押贷款。我们显示，随着市场利率上升，2022年和2023年有抵押贷款的房主的流动性率下降。我们观察到绝对下降，以及相对于不受抵押贷款利率锁定影响的无抵押贷款房主的相对下降。流动性下降无法由房屋价值变化解释。总体而言，我们的估计表明，利率上升导致2022年和2023年有抵押贷款家庭的流动性降低了16%，并造成了200亿美元的无谓损失。

32780.title: Present Bias in Politics and Self-Committing Treaties
32780.zh_title: 政治中的现时偏差与自我承诺型条约
32780.abstract: We study how international agreements can take advantage of domestic time-inconsistency problems in the context of environmental policies. For example, policymakers will prefer future policies to be sustainable, but find it tempting to raise consumption when being in office. We find the equilibrium number of signatory countries to be higher than when preferences are time consistent, especially when the political environment is unstable and polarized, and the international spillovers are limited. In contrast to the traditional literature, the model can also explain why countries sign conventions with mandates that do not vary with the coalition size.
32780.zh_abstract: 我们研究国际协议如何利用国内在环境政策背景下的时间不一致性问题。例如，政策制定者会偏好未来的政策具有可持续性，但在执政时却发现提高消费的诱惑难以抗拒。我们发现，均衡的签署国数量高于偏好时间一致时的水平，尤其是在政治环境不稳定且极化、国际溢出效应有限的情况下。与传统文献相反，该模型还能解释为何国家会签署授权条款不随联盟规模变化的公约。

32779.title: Unconditional Cash Transfers: A Bayesian Meta-Analysis of Randomized Evaluations in Low and Middle Income Countries
32779.zh_title: 无条件现金转移：基于中低收入国家随机评估的贝叶斯元分析
32779.authors: Tommaso Crosta, Dean Karlan, Finley Ong, Julius Rüschenpöhler, Christopher R. Udry
32779.abstract: We use Bayesian meta-analysis methods to estimate the impact of unconditional cash transfers (UCTs). Aggregating evidence from 115 studies of 72 UCT programs in middle and low income countries, we find strong and positive average treatment effects on ten of thirteen outcomes: monthly household total and food consumption, monthly income, labor supply, school enrollment, food security, psychological well-being, total assets, financial assets, and children height-for-age. We examine seven specific theoretical and policy hypotheses, such as presence of savings frictions, dynamic effects, curvature of marginal returns, targeting effects, “nudge” effects, labor supply elasticity and related “dependency” theories, and contextual heterogeneity.
32779.zh_abstract: 我们使用贝叶斯元分析方法来估计无条件现金转移的影响。汇总来自中低收入国家72个无条件现金转移项目的115项研究的证据，我们发现，在十三个结果变量中的十个上存在强烈且正向的平均处理效应：月度家庭总消费和食品消费、月收入、劳动力供给、入学率、粮食安全、心理健康、总资产、金融资产以及儿童年龄别身高。我们检验了七个具体的理论和政策假设，例如储蓄摩擦的存在、动态效应、边际收益的曲率、瞄准效应、“助推”效应、劳动力供给弹性及相关“依赖”理论，以及情境异质性。

32778.title: The Long-Run Impacts of Banning Affirmative Action in US Higher Education
32778.zh_title: 禁止美国高等教育平权行动的长期影响
32778.authors: Francisca M. Antman, Brian Duncan, Michael F. Lovenheim
32778.abstract: This paper estimates the long-run impacts of banning affirmative action on men and women from under-represented minority (URM) racial and ethnic groups in the United States. Using data from the US Census and American Community Survey, we use a difference-in-differences framework to compare the college degree completion, graduate degree completion, earnings, and employment of URM individuals to non-URM individuals before and after affirmative action bans went into effect across several US states. We also employ event study analyses and alternative estimators to confirm the validity of our approach and discuss the generalizability of the findings. Results suggest that banning affirmative action results in a decline in URM women’s college degree completion, earnings, and employment relative to non-Hispanic White women, driven largely by impacts on Hispanic women. Thus, affirmative action bans resulted in an increase in racial/ethnic disparities in both college degree completion and earnings among women. Effects on URM men are more ambiguous and indicate significant heterogeneity across states, with some estimates pointing to a possible positive impact on labor market outcomes of Black men. These results suggest that the relative magnitude of college quality versus mismatch effects vary for URM men and women and highlight the importance of disaggregating results by gender, race, and ethnicity. We conclude by discussing how our results compare with others in the literature and directions for future research.
32778.zh_abstract: 本文估计了禁止平权行动对美国来自代表性不足少数种族和族裔群体的男性和女性的长期影响。利用美国人口普查和美国社区调查的数据，我们采用双重差分框架，比较了在多个美国州平权行动禁令生效前后，代表性不足少数群体个体与非代表性不足少数群体个体在大学学位完成、研究生学位完成、收入和就业方面的差异。我们还采用了事件研究分析和替代估计量来确认我们方法的有效性，并讨论了研究结果的普适性。结果表明，禁止平权行动导致代表性不足少数群体女性的大学学位完成率、收入和就业相对于非西班牙裔白人女性下降，这主要由对西班牙裔女性的影响驱动。因此，平权行动禁令导致女性群体内部在大学毕业率和收入方面的种族/民族差异扩大。对代表性不足少数群体男性的影响则更为模糊，并表明各州之间存在显著的异质性，一些估计指向对黑人男性劳动力市场结果可能产生积极影响。这些结果表明，大学质量效应与错配效应的相对大小对代表性不足少数群体男性和女性有所不同，并强调了按性别、种族和族裔分解结果的重要性。最后，我们讨论了我们的结果与文献中其他研究的比较情况以及未来研究的方向。

32777.title: Pocketbook Politics: The Impact of Wealth on Political Preferences and Participation
32777.zh_title: 钱包政治：财富对政治偏好与参与的影响
32777.authors: Anton Brännlund, David Cesarini, Karl-Oskar Lindgren, Erik Lindqvist, Sven Oskarsson, Robert Östling
32777.abstract: The rich tend to support policies favoring the affluent and are over-represented among both voters and legislators. This paper investigates whether these correlations reflect causal effects of wealth by leveraging random, positive wealth shocks in the form of lottery prizes. Compared to suitably matched controls, large-prize winners are no more likely to cast votes in national elections or run for political office. We also find no significant effects of parents’ lottery winnings on their children’s political participation. But winners of large lottery prizes become more negative toward taxes on wealth, real estate and inheritances. Although we do not detect any statistically significant effects on other political preferences, effects tend to go in the direction of a more right-wing political orientation. We find no evidence that lottery wealth changes moral values or strengthen beliefs in the importance of hard work for success in life.
32777.zh_abstract: 富人倾向于支持有利于富裕阶层的政策，并且在选民和立法者中代表性过高。本文通过利用彩票奖金形式的随机正向财富冲击，研究这些相关性是否反映了财富的因果效应。与适当匹配的对照组相比，大奖得主在全国选举中投票或竞选公职的可能性并未增加。我们也未发现父母的彩票中奖对其子女政治参与有显著影响。但大奖得主对财富税、房地产税和遗产税的态度变得更加负面。尽管我们未检测到对其他政治偏好的任何统计显著影响，但影响趋势倾向于更右翼的政治取向。我们没有发现证据表明彩票财富会改变道德价值观或强化“努力工作是人生成功关键”的信念。

32776.title: The Fiscal Contract up Close: Experimental Evidence from Mexico City
32776.zh_title: 近距离观察财政契约：来自墨西哥城的实验证据
32776.authors: Anne Brockmeyer, Francisco Garfias, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato
32776.abstract: Can the provision of public goods strengthen the fiscal capacity of governments in developing countries and move them toward an equilibrium of widespread tax compliance? We present evidence of the impact of local public infrastructure on tax compliance, leveraging a large public investment experiment and individual property tax records from Mexico City. Despite the salience and large effects of these investments on access to infrastructure, property values, and local economic development, we find no changes in property tax compliance and can rule out even small increases. These null effects persist even when taxpayers are reminded about the tax-benefit link.
32776.zh_abstract: 在发展中国家，公共产品的提供能否增强政府的财政能力，并推动其走向广泛税收遵从的均衡？我们利用墨西哥城的一项大型公共投资实验和个体财产税记录，展示了地方公共基础设施对税收遵从的影响证据。尽管这些投资在基础设施可及性、房产价值和地方经济发展方面具有显著性和巨大影响，但我们发现财产税遵从度没有变化，并且可以排除即使是微小的增长。即使当纳税人被提醒税收与福利之间的联系时，这些零效应依然存在。

32774.title: World War II Service and the GI Bill New Evidence on Selection and Veterans’ Outcomes from Linked Census Records
32774.zh_title: 二战服役与《退伍军人权利法案》：来自关联人口普查记录关于选择性和退伍军人结果的新证据
32774.abstract: We examine new datasets of records linked between the 1940 and 1950 US censuses to characterize selection into military service during World War II and to analyze differences in veterans’ post-war educational and labor market outcomes relative to nonveterans. Motivated by potentially disparate selection into and effects of service, we pay particular attention to groups distinguished by age, pre-war educational attainment, race, and nativity. We find that veterans were positively selected on pre-war educational attainment, but negatively or neutrally selected in terms of own or fathers’ pre-war labor market characteristics. Younger veterans fared better in terms of education and labor market outcomes in 1950 than nonveterans who were observationally similar in 1940. Older veterans exhibited relative gains in education compared to observationally similar nonveterans, but not in labor market outcomes. Black veterans’ relative gains in education were relatively large, but black veterans not in school were less likely to be employed than observationally similar nonveterans in 1950. All groups of veterans were more likely to be government employees after the war and were under-represented in self-employment.
32774.zh_abstract: 我们利用1940年和1950年美国人口普查之间关联记录的新数据集，来刻画二战期间服兵役的选择性，并分析退伍军人与非退伍军人相比在战后教育和劳动力市场结果上的差异。考虑到服役可能存在的不同选择性和影响，我们特别关注按年龄、战前教育程度、种族和出生地划分的群体。我们发现，退伍军人在战前教育程度上是正向选择的，但在自身或父亲的战前劳动力市场特征方面是负向或中性选择的。较年轻的退伍军人在1950年的教育和劳动力市场结果上，优于1940年观测特征相似的非退伍军人。较年长的退伍军人相较于观测特征相似的非退伍军人，在教育方面表现出相对收益，但在劳动力市场结果上没有。黑人退伍军人在教育方面的相对收益较大，但未上学的黑人退伍军人在1950年比观测特征相似的非退伍军人更不可能就业。所有群体的退伍军人在战后更可能成为政府雇员，而在自雇职业中的代表性不足。
32774.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I24, I28, J31, J61, N32

32773.title: Employment and Community: Socioeconomic Cooperation and Its Breakdown
32773.zh_title: 就业与社区：社会经济合作及其瓦解
32773.abstract: We propose a model of the interplay of employment relationships and community-based interactions among workers and managers. Employment relations can be either tough (where workers are monitored intensively and obtain few rents, and managers do not provide informal favors for their workers) or soft (where there is less monitoring, more worker rents, and more workplace favor exchange). Both workers and managers also exert effort in providing community benefits. The threat of losing access to community benefits can motivate managers to keep employment soft; conversely, the threat of losing future employment or future workers' trust can motivate workers and managers to exert effort in the community. Improvements in monitoring technologies; automation, outsourcing, and offshoring; declines in the minimum wage; and opportunities for residential segregation or for privatizing community-provided services can make both workers and managers worse-off by undermining soft employment relations and community cooperation.
32773.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，描述就业关系与工人和管理者之间基于社区的互动之间的相互作用。就业关系可以是强硬的（工人受到严密监控，获得很少租金，管理者不为工人提供非正式帮助）或温和的（监控较少，工人租金更多，工作场所的恩惠交换更多）。工人和管理者也都为提供社区福利付出努力。失去社区福利的威胁可以激励管理者保持温和的就业关系；反之，失去未来就业或未来工人信任的威胁可以激励工人和管理者为社区付出努力。监控技术的改进、自动化、外包和离岸外包、最低工资的下降，以及居住隔离或社区提供服务的私有化机会，可能通过削弱温和的就业关系和社区合作，使工人和管理者都变得更糟。

32772.title: Social Interaction Intensity and Investor Behavior
32772.zh_title: 社交互动强度与投资者行为
32772.authors: Michael Gelman, David Hirshleifer, Yaron Levi, Liron Reiter-Gavish
32772.abstract: We document a causal effect of social interactions on investor behavior using the number of local soccer games as a measure of social interaction intensity. Social transmission is identifiable in buy but not sell trades. Social Interaction Intensity (SII) increases the sensitivity of buying to past buys, particularly in riskier stocks. This sensitivity is an increasing and convex function of past returns, with higher SII further amplifying the effect. Social interactions cause an extremity shift wherein existing shareholders increase their positions, especially within demographically homogeneous communities. Higher social interaction intensity increases the sensitivity of individual investors’ trading volume and portfolio riskiness to past trades. At the market level, SII increases the sensitivity of stock trading volume and retail ownership percentage to past buys.
32772.zh_abstract: 我们利用当地足球比赛的数量作为社交互动强度的衡量指标，记录了社交互动对投资者行为的因果效应。社交传递在买入交易中可识别，但在卖出交易中则不然。社交互动强度增加了买入行为对过去买入行为的敏感性，尤其是在风险较高的股票中。这种敏感性是过去收益的递增凸函数，更高的社交互动强度进一步放大了这一效应。社交互动导致极端转移，即现有股东增加其头寸，尤其是在人口同质性高的社区内。更高的社交互动强度增加了个人投资者交易量和投资组合风险对过去交易的敏感性。在市场层面，社交互动强度增加了股票交易量和散户持股比例对过去买入行为的敏感性。
32772.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：D14, D9, D91, G11, G12, G40, G5, G50

32771.title: Abortion Access and Child Maltreatment
32771.zh_title: 堕胎可及性与儿童虐待
32771.authors: Erkmen G. Aslim, Wei Fu, Erdal Tekin
32771.abstract: This study examines the link between abortion access and child maltreatment using data from the National Incident-Based Reporting System, National Child Abuse and Neglect Data System (NCANDS), and the Myers abortion facility database from 2011 to 2018. A 100-mile increase in travel distance to the nearest abortion facility increases maltreatment reports by 8.5%, driven by child neglect and physical abuse, with strongest effects for infants, non-White children, and those in disadvantaged, minority, and rural areas. Analyses with NCANDS data and eviction records highlight economic stability and housing security as mediators. These findings highlight the importance of reproductive healthcare access in reducing maltreatment and alleviating associated socioeconomic challenges.
32771.zh_abstract: 本研究利用2011年至2018年国家基于事件的报告系统、国家儿童虐待和忽视数据系统以及迈尔斯堕胎设施数据库的数据，考察了堕胎可及性与儿童虐待之间的联系。到最近堕胎设施的旅行距离每增加100英里，虐待报告增加8.5%，这主要由儿童忽视和身体虐待驱动，对婴儿、非白人儿童以及处于弱势、少数族裔和农村地区的儿童影响最强。利用国家儿童虐待和忽视数据系统数据和驱逐记录进行的分析，强调了经济稳定和住房保障作为中介因素。这些发现凸显了生殖保健可及性在减少虐待和缓解相关社会经济挑战方面的重要性。

32770.title: Bank Payout Policy, Regulation, and Politics
32770.zh_title: 银行 payout 政策、监管与政治
32770.authors: Rüdiger Fahlenbrach, Minsu Ko, René M. Stulz
32770.abstract: Bank payout policy is strongly affected by regulation and politics, especially for the largest banks. Banks, but not industrial firms, have consistently lower payouts in times of high regulation uncertainty and under democratic presidents. After the Global Financial Crisis, bank regulators’ influence on payout policies of the largest banks increases sharply and repurchases become more important than dividends for these banks. Repurchases respond more to regulatory climate changes than dividends. The stock-price reaction of the largest banks to the election of Donald Trump is larger than for small banks or industrial firms, and their repurchases increase sharply afterwards.
32770.zh_abstract: 银行的 payout 政策受到监管和政治的强烈影响，尤其是对于最大的银行。银行（而非工业企业）在监管不确定性高和民主党总统执政时期，始终具有较低的 payout。在全球金融危机之后，银行监管者对最大银行 payout 政策的影响急剧增加，且对于这些银行而言，股票回购变得比股息更重要。回购对监管环境变化的反应比股息更大。最大银行对唐纳德·特朗普当选的股价反应大于小银行或工业企业，且其回购在此后急剧增加。

32769.title: Understanding Korea’s Long-Run Real Exchange Rate Behavior
32769.zh_title: 理解韩国的长期实际汇率行为
32769.abstract: Korea’s real exchange rate has displayed a mild downward trend since the 1980s, with fluctuations of ±20 percent around that trend. This pattern is surprising because the classic Harrod-Balassa-Samuelson framework suggests that countries experiencing rapid growth in the productivity of their tradable industries should experience real currency appreciation over time. We decompose the sources of change behind the Korean won’s real exchange rate into internal price drivers (the relative price of nontradable goods) and external price drivers (the international relative price of tradable consumption goods, which is heavily dependent on the nominal exchange rate). We find that, on average, the variability in Korea’s real exchange rate, even over long periods, is overwhelmingly due to external price factors. Given the persistent medium-term effects of nominal exchange rate changes on the real exchange rate, the Korean policy of intervening in foreign exchange markets to smooth exchange rate fluctuations appears prudent. However, we also find that over the entire period 1985-2023, internal price factors are the main explanator of the won’s real depreciation. This finding poses a puzzle for standard accounts of the linkage between productivity growth and real exchange rates.
32769.zh_abstract: 自20世纪80年代以来，韩国的实际汇率呈现出温和的下降趋势，并围绕该趋势有±20%的波动。这一模式令人惊讶，因为经典的哈罗德-巴拉萨-萨缪尔森框架表明，可贸易品行业生产率快速增长的国家，其实际汇率应随时间升值。我们将韩元实际汇率变化背后的来源分解为内部价格驱动因素（非贸易品的相对价格）和外部价格驱动因素（可贸易消费品的国际相对价格，该价格严重依赖于名义汇率）。我们发现，平均而言，韩国实际汇率的波动，即使在长期内，也绝大部分是由外部价格因素造成的。鉴于名义汇率变动对实际汇率存在持续的中期影响，韩国干预外汇市场以平滑汇率波动的政策似乎是审慎的。然而，我们也发现，在整个1985-2023年期间，内部价格因素是韩元实际贬值的主要解释因素。这一发现对生产率增长与实际汇率之间联系的标准解释提出了一个难题。

32768.title: Deep Learning for Economists
32768.abstract: Deep learning provides powerful methods to impute structured information from large-scale, unstructured text and image datasets. For example, economists might wish to detect the presence of economic activity in satellite images, or to measure the topics or entities mentioned in social media, the congressional record, or firm filings. This review introduces deep neural networks, covering methods such as classifiers, regression models, generative AI, and embedding models. Applications include classification, document digitization, record linkage, and methods for data exploration in massive scale text and image corpora. When suitable methods are used, deep learning models can be cheap to tune and can scale affordably to problems involving millions or billions of data points.. The review is accompanied by a companion website, EconDL, with user-friendly demo notebooks, software resources, and a knowledge base that provides technical details and additional applications.
32768.zh_abstract: 深度学习提供了强大的方法，可以从大规模、非结构化的文本和图像数据集中提取结构化信息。例如，经济学家可能希望检测卫星图像中的经济活动存在性，或衡量社交媒体、国会记录或公司文件中提及的主题或实体。本综述介绍了深度神经网络，涵盖了分类器、回归模型、生成式人工智能和嵌入模型等方法。应用包括分类、文档数字化、记录链接，以及在超大规模文本和图像语料库中进行数据探索的方法。当使用合适的方法时，深度学习模型可以廉价地进行调优，并且可以经济地扩展到涉及数百万或数十亿数据点的问题。本综述附带一个配套网站 EconDL，其中包含用户友好的演示笔记本、软件资源以及提供技术细节和额外应用的知识库。
32768.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS, PE, POL, TWP；JEL：C0

32767.title: The Effect of New Information Technologies on Asset Pricing Anomalies
32767.zh_title: 新信息技术对资产定价异常的影响
32767.abstract: We test and compare the effects of introduction of two new financial information technologies, EDGAR and XBRL, on well-known asset pricing anomalies often attributed to mispricing. EDGAR facilitates easier access to public accounting information about public firms; XBRL reduces the cost of processing such information. Using stacked difference-in-differences regressions, we find that both EDGAR and XBRL reduce mispricing for accounting-based anomalies but not for non-accounting-based anomalies. The economic magnitudes of the effects on accounting-based anomalies are similar for EDGAR and XBRL. These results suggest that both easier access to and less costly processing of public information enhance market efficiency.
32767.zh_abstract: 我们检验并比较了两种新金融信息技术——EDGAR和XBRL——的引入对通常归因于错误定价的知名资产定价异常的影响。EDGAR使获取上市公司的公开会计信息更加便捷；XBRL降低了处理此类信息的成本。利用堆叠双重差分回归，我们发现EDGAR和XBRL均减少了基于会计的异常中的错误定价，但对非基于会计的异常没有影响。EDGAR和XBRL对基于会计异常影响的经济规模相似。这些结果表明，更便捷地获取公开信息以及更低成本地处理公开信息均能提升市场效率。

32766.title: Driving the Gig Economy
32766.authors: Katharine G. Abraham, John C. Haltiwanger, Claire Y. Hou, Kristin Sandusky, James Spletzer
32766.abstract: Using rich administrative tax data, we explore the effects of the introduction of online ridesharing platforms on entry, employment and earnings in the Taxi and Limousine Services industry. Ridesharing dramatically increased the pace of entry of workers into the industry. New entrants were increasingly likely to be young, female, White and U.S. born, and to combine earnings from ridesharing with wage and salary earnings. Displaced workers found ridesharing to be a substantially more attractive fallback option than driving a taxi. Ridesharing also affected the incumbent taxi driver workforce. The exit rates of low-earning taxi drivers increased following the introduction of ridesharing in their city; exit rates of high-earning taxi drivers were little affected. In cities without regulations limiting the size of the taxi fleet, both groups of drivers experienced earnings losses following the introduction of ridesharing. These losses were ameliorated or absent in more heavily regulated markets.
32766.zh_abstract: 利用丰富的行政税收数据，我们探讨了在线拼车平台的引入对出租车和豪华轿车服务行业进入、就业和收入的影响。拼车极大地加快了工人进入该行业的速度。新进入者越来越可能是年轻人、女性、白人和美国本土出生者，并且将拼车收入与工资和薪金收入相结合。失业工人发现拼车是比开出租车更具吸引力的后备选择。拼车也影响了在职出租车司机队伍。在引入拼车后，低收入出租车司机的退出率上升；高收入出租车司机的退出率几乎未受影响。在没有限制出租车车队规模法规的城市，两类司机在引入拼车后均遭受收入损失。在监管更严格的市场中，这些损失有所缓解或不存在。

32765.title: Estimating the Value of Offsite Tracking Data to Advertisers: Evidence from Meta
32765.zh_title: 估算场外追踪数据对广告商的价值：来自Meta的证据
32765.authors: Nils Wernerfelt, Anna Tuchman, Bradley Shapiro, Robert Moakler
32765.abstract: Third-party cookies and related ‘offsite’ tracking technologies are frequently used to share user data across applications in support of ad delivery. These data are viewed as highly valuable for online advertisers, but their usage faces increasing headwinds. In this paper, we quantify the benefit to advertisers from using such offsite tracking data in their ad delivery. With this goal in mind, we conduct a large-scale, randomized experiment that includes more than 70,000 advertisers on Facebook and Instagram. We first estimate advertising effectiveness at baseline across our broad sample. We then estimate the change in effectiveness of the same campaigns were advertisers to lose the ability to optimize ad delivery with offsite data. In each of these cases, we use recently developed deconvolution techniques to flexibly estimate the underlying distribution of effects. We find a median cost per incremental customer at baseline of $\$38.16$ that under the median loss in effectiveness would rise to $\$49.93$, a 31% increase. Further, we find ads targeted using offsite data generate more long-term customers per dollar than those without, and losing offsite data disproportionately hurts small scale advertisers. Taken together, our results suggest that offsite data bring large benefits to a wide range of advertisers.
32765.zh_abstract: 第三方cookie及相关“场外”追踪技术经常用于跨应用共享用户数据以支持广告投放。这些数据被认为对在线广告商极具价值，但其使用面临日益增长的阻力。在本文中，我们量化了广告商在广告投放中使用此类场外追踪数据的收益。为此，我们进行了一项大规模随机实验，涵盖Facebook和Instagram上超过7万名广告商。我们首先在广泛样本中估计基线广告效果。然后，我们估计如果广告商失去使用场外数据优化广告投放的能力，同一广告活动的效果变化。在每种情况下，我们使用最近开发的反卷积技术灵活估计效果的潜在分布。我们发现基线时每个增量客户的中位成本为38.16美元，而在效果中位损失下将上升至49.93美元，增幅为31%。此外，我们发现使用场外数据定向的广告每美元产生的长期客户多于未使用的广告，而失去场外数据对小型广告商的伤害尤为严重。综合来看，我们的结果表明场外数据为广泛的广告商带来了巨大收益。
32765.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：L15, L40, L49, L59, M30, M31, M37, M38

32764.title: Biomarkers in SHARE: Documentation of Implementation, Collection, and Analysis of Dried Blood Spot (DBS) Samples 2015 – 2023
32764.zh_title: SHARE中的生物标志物：干血斑样本实施、收集和分析的文档（2015-2023）
32764.authors: Martina Börsch-Supan, Karen Andersen-Ranberg, Nis Borbye-Lorenzen, Jake Cofferen, Rebecca Groh, Hannah M. Horton, Elizabeth Kerschner, Thu Minh Kha, Alan Potter, Daniel Schmidutz, Kristin Skogstrand, Aijing Sun, Luzia Weiss, Mark H. Wener, Axel H. Börsch-Supan
32764.abstract: SHARE, the “Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe”, is a large population-based panel survey among people aged 50 and over with data from 28 European countries and Israel. It investigates individual, economic, health-related, and social life-course circumstances in order to shed light on the challenges of population aging for individuals and society as a whole. Understanding aging per se, and how we age differently over the life course given our individual backgrounds, current health, and socio-economic factors, are the aims of SHARE.\nIn order to maintain intertemporal, international and intercultural comparability, SHARE has adopted collection of objective data in the health domain. SHARE measures physical performance, such as grip strength, peak expiratory flow, walking speed, chair stand, word recall, and Euro-D depression among others in the physical, cognitive and mental health modules. In 2015, SHARE collected dried blood spot (DBS) samples as an additional objective measure of health. Eleven European countries and Israel participated in the DBS collection. The collection was harmonized in terms of designing documents, gaining consent, procuring blood-collection material, and training interviewers how to collect DBS samples while observing the national ethic and administrative regulations in all countries. Altogether, approximately 27,200 respondents consented, resulting in an overall participation rate of 67% with considerable differences between countries and interviewers. \nThis report describes the carefully monitored processes of gaining consent for DBS collection and for the implementation, collection and evaluation of the to-date largest DBS-based study of a representative adult population in Europe. We also describe the choice of blood biomarkers, the assays employed to determine the blood biomarker concentrations in DBS collected in the home of survey respondents and the validation and adjustment of the laboratory results for the impact of sample collection in a non-medical environment. Finally, we present the data obtained for seven out of 17 blood biomarkers. The data for the remaining ten biomarkers analyzed at the Statens Serum Institut will follow in a separate release.
32764.zh_abstract: SHARE（“欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查”）是一项针对50岁及以上人群的大型人口面板调查，数据来自28个欧洲国家和以色列。它调查个人、经济、健康和社会生活历程，以揭示人口老龄化对个人和整个社会的挑战。理解衰老本身，以及鉴于个人背景、当前健康和社会经济因素，我们在生命历程中如何不同地衰老，是SHARE的目标。为了保持跨时间、跨国和跨文化的可比性，SHARE在健康领域采用了客观数据的收集。SHARE在身体、认知和心理健康模块中测量身体表现，如握力、呼气峰值流量、步行速度、椅子站立、单词回忆和Euro-D抑郁等。2015年，SHARE收集了干血斑样本作为额外的客观健康测量。11个欧洲国家和以色列参与了DBS收集。收集工作在文件设计、获取同意、采购采血材料以及培训访员如何在遵守各国伦理和行政规定的情况下收集DBS样本方面进行了协调。总共有约27,200名受访者同意，总体参与率为67%，各国和访员之间存在显著差异。本报告描述了为获取DBS收集同意以及实施、收集和评估迄今为止欧洲代表性成年人口中最大的基于DBS的研究而精心监控的过程。我们还描述了血液生物标志物的选择、用于测定受访者家中收集的DBS中血液生物标志物浓度的检测方法，以及针对非医疗环境中样本收集影响对实验室结果进行的验证和调整。最后，我们展示了17种血液生物标志物中7种的数据。其余10种在Statens Serum Institut分析的生物标志物的数据将在单独发布中提供。

32763.title: Distributed Ledgers and Secure Multi-Party Computation for Financial Reporting and Auditing
32763.zh_title: 分布式账本和安全多方计算在财务报告与审计中的应用
32763.authors: Sean S. Cao, Lin William Cong, Baozhong Yang
32763.abstract: To understand the disruption and implications of distributed ledger technologies for financial reporting and auditing, we analyze firm misreporting, auditor monitoring and competition, and regulatory policy in a unified model. A federated blockchain for financial reporting and auditing can improve verification efficiency not only for transactions in private databases, but also for cross-chain verifications through privacy-preserving computation protocols. Despite the potential benefit of blockchains, private incentives for firms and first-mover advantages for auditors can create inefficient under-adoption or partial adoption that favors larger auditors. Although a regulator can help coordinate the adoption of technology, endogenous choice of transaction partners by firms can still lead to adoption failure. Our model also provides an initial framework for further studies of the costs and implications of the use of distributed ledgers and secure multi-party computation in financial reporting, including the positive spillover to discretionary auditing and who should bear the cost of adoption.
32763.zh_abstract: 为了理解分布式账本技术对财务报告和审计的颠覆性影响及其含义，我们在一个统一模型中分析了公司错误报告、审计师监督与竞争以及监管政策。用于财务报告和审计的联盟区块链不仅可以提高私有数据库中交易的验证效率，还可以通过隐私保护计算协议实现跨链验证。尽管区块链具有潜在好处，但公司的私人激励和审计师的先发优势可能导致低效的未采用或部分采用，从而有利于大型审计师。尽管监管机构可以帮助协调技术的采用，但公司对交易伙伴的内生选择仍可能导致采用失败。我们的模型也为进一步研究分布式账本和安全多方计算在财务报告中的使用成本和影响（包括对自由裁量审计的正向溢出效应以及谁应承担采用成本）提供了初步框架。
32763.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：D21, D40, G32, G34, M42, M48

32799.title: Health Inequality and Health Types
32799.zh_title: 健康不平等与健康类型
32799.authors: Margherita Borella, Francisco A. Bullano, Mariacristina De Nardi, Benjamin Krueger, Elena Manresa
32799.abstract: While health affects many economic outcomes, its dynamics are still poorly understood. We use k means clustering, a machine learning technique, and data from the Health and Retirement Study to identify health types during middle and old age. We identify five health types: the vigorous resilient, the fair-health resilient, the fair-health vulnerable, the frail resilient, and the frail vulnerable. They are characterized by different starting health and health and mortality trajectories. Our five health types account for 84% of the variation in health trajectories and are not explained by observable characteristics, such as age, marital status, education, gender, race, health-related behaviors, and health insurance status, but rather, by one’s past health dynamics. We also show that health types are important drivers of health and mortality heterogeneity and dynamics. Our results underscore the importance of better understanding health type formation and of modeling it appropriately to properly evaluate the effects of health on people’s decisions and the implications of policy reforms.
32799.zh_abstract: 尽管健康影响许多经济结果，但其动态变化仍未被充分理解。我们使用k均值聚类这一机器学习技术，结合健康与退休研究的数据，识别中老年时期的健康类型。我们识别出五种健康类型：强健韧性型、一般健康韧性型、一般健康脆弱型、虚弱韧性型和虚弱脆弱型。这些类型以不同的初始健康状况以及健康和死亡率轨迹为特征。我们的五种健康类型解释了健康轨迹变异的84%，并且无法由可观测特征（如年龄、婚姻状况、教育、性别、种族、健康相关行为和健康保险状况）解释，而是由个人过去的健康动态所决定。我们还表明，健康类型是健康和死亡率异质性与动态的重要驱动因素。我们的结果强调了更好地理解健康类型形成以及对其进行适当建模的重要性，以便正确评估健康对人们决策的影响以及政策改革的含义。

32798.title: Sabotage as Industrial Policy
32798.zh_title: 作为产业政策的破坏行为
32798.authors: Jin Liu, Martin Rotemberg, Sharon Traiberman
32798.abstract: We characterize sabotage, exemplified by recent U.S. policies concerning China's semiconductor industry, as trade policy. For some (but not all) goods, completely destroying foreigners’ productivity increases domestic real income by shifting the location of production and improving the terms of trade. The gross benefit of sabotage can be summarized by a few sufficient statistics: trade and demand elasticities and import and production shares. The cost of sabotage is determined by countries' relative unit labor costs for the sabotaged goods. We find important non-monotinicities: for semi-conductors, partially sabotaging foreign production would lower US real income, while comprehensive sabotage would raise it.
32798.zh_abstract: 我们将破坏行为（以近期美国针对中国半导体产业的政策为例）定性为贸易政策。对于某些（但非全部）商品，完全摧毁外国生产率可以通过改变生产地点和改善贸易条件来提高国内实际收入。破坏行为的总收益可由几个充分统计量概括：贸易和需求弹性以及进口和生产份额。破坏行为的成本则由各国在受破坏商品上的相对单位劳动成本决定。我们发现重要的非单调性：对于半导体而言，部分破坏外国生产会降低美国实际收入，而全面破坏则会提高实际收入。

32797.title: Inefficient Labor Market Sorting
32797.zh_title: 低效的劳动力市场分类
32797.abstract: A growing empirical literature attributes much of the productivity advantages of large, "superstar" firms to their adoption of best practice management techniques that allow them to better identify and use talented workers. The reasons for the incomplete adoption of these "structured management practices" (SMPs) and their welfare implications are not well understood. This paper provides a positive and normative analysis of these issues in a theoretical framework in which SMPs induce sorting of talent across firms. Incomplete adoption arises because SMPs are costly and worker talent is in limited supply. In equilibrium there is excessive adoption of SMPs and too much sorting of talented workers into large firms. In this second-best environment, policy changes that favor large firms, such as trade liberalization, have the potential to lower welfare.
32797.zh_abstract: 越来越多的实证文献将大型“超级明星”企业的生产率优势归因于它们采用了最佳管理实践，从而能够更好地识别和利用有才能的工人。对于这些“结构化管理制度”未被完全采用的原因及其福利影响，目前尚不明确。本文在一个理论框架中对此进行了实证和规范分析，该框架下结构化管理制度导致人才在企业间的分类。不完全采用的原因在于结构化管理制度成本高昂且人才供给有限。在均衡状态下，结构化管理制度被过度采用，有才能的工人过度集中于大型企业。在这种次优环境中，有利于大型企业的政策变化（如贸易自由化）有可能降低福利。
32797.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F12, F16, J31, J33, J42, M51

32796.title: Pension Reforms and Inequality in Germany: Micro-Modelling
32796.zh_title: 德国养老金改革与不平等：微观建模
32796.authors: Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Johannes Rausch, Luca Salerno
32796.abstract: Germany, like many other countries, has undergone a series of pension reforms since the 1980s which generally decreased benefit generosity and increased the retirement age due to demographic pressures. This paper investigates whether these reforms have increased income and wealth inequality among retirees. In order to answer this question, we employed counterfactual simulations in which we predict how the income and social security wealth distributions would have developed if these reforms had not taken place, compared to the actual development of the income and social security wealth distributions. \nOur analysis reveals that the pension reforms has led to an increase in inequality in terms of social security wealth between the 1990s and 2000s and decreased inequality thereafter. The decrease in inequality is mainly driven by social assistance as it represents a lower bound for benefit size and thus mitigates the effect of benefit-reducing reforms for lower income groups. We further divided the total effect of the pension reforms into two components. The first component is the mechanical effect, which keeps retirement probabilities constant and only considers changes in benefit calculation. The second component is the behavioral effect, which describes how SSW differs because of altered retirement probabilities. Our findings indicate that in the German context the behavioral effect is statistically significant but economically small.
32796.zh_abstract: 与许多其他国家一样，德国自20世纪80年代以来经历了一系列养老金改革，这些改革通常因人口压力而降低了福利慷慨程度并提高了退休年龄。本文研究了这些改革是否增加了退休人员的收入和财富不平等。为了回答这个问题，我们采用了反事实模拟，预测如果这些改革没有发生，收入和社会保障财富分布将如何发展，并与实际发展情况进行比较。我们的分析显示，养老金改革在20世纪90年代至21世纪初导致社会保障财富不平等加剧，此后不平等程度下降。不平等程度的下降主要由社会救助驱动，因为它构成了福利规模的下限，从而减轻了福利削减改革对低收入群体的影响。我们进一步将养老金改革的总效应分解为两个部分：第一部分是机械效应，保持退休概率不变，仅考虑福利计算的变化；第二部分是行为效应，描述因退休概率改变而导致的社会保障财富差异。我们的研究结果表明，在德国背景下，行为效应在统计上显著但在经济上较小。

32783.title: Bank Lending and Deposit Crunches during the Great Depression
32783.zh_title: 大萧条时期的银行信贷与存款紧缩
32783.abstract: Bank distress was a defining feature of the Great Depression in the United States. Most banks, however, weathered the storm and remained in operation throughout the contraction. We show that surviving banks cut lending when depositors withdrew funds en masse during panics. This panic-induced decline in lending explains about one-third of the reduction in aggregate commercial bank lending between 1929 and 1932, more than twice as much as attributed to the failure of banks.
32783.zh_abstract: 银行困境是美国大萧条的一个显著特征。然而，大多数银行经受住了风暴，在整个经济收缩期间持续运营。我们表明，在恐慌期间，当储户大规模提取资金时，幸存的银行削减了贷款。这种由恐慌引发的贷款下降，解释了1929年至1932年间商业银行总贷款减少量的大约三分之一，是银行倒闭所导致减少量的两倍多。
32783.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ME；JEL：N1, N10, N12, N2, N22

32775.title: Global Hegemony and Exorbitant Privilege
32775.abstract: We present a dynamic two-country model in which military spending, geopolitical risk, and government bond prices are jointly determined. The model is consistent with three empirical facts: hegemons have a funding advantage, this advantage rises with geopolitical tensions, and war losers suffer from higher debt devaluation than victors. Even though higher debt capacity increases the military and financial advantage of the exogenously stronger country, it also gives rise to equilibrium multiplicity and the possibility that the weaker country overwhelms the stronger country with support from financial markets. For intermediate debt capacity, transitional dynamics exhibit geopolitical hysteresis, with dominance determined by initial conditions, unless war is realized and induces a hegemonic transition. For high debt capacity, transitional dynamics exhibit geopolitical fragility, where bond market expectations drive unpredictable transitions in dominance, and hegemonic transitions occur even in the absence of war.
32775.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个动态的两国模型，在该模型中，军费开支、地缘政治风险和政府债券价格是共同决定的。该模型与三个经验事实一致：霸权国家具有融资优势；这种优势随着地缘政治紧张局势加剧而上升；战争失败者比胜利者遭受更高的债务贬值。尽管更高的债务能力增强了外生较强国家的军事和金融优势，但它也导致了均衡的多重性，以及较弱国家在金融市场支持下压倒较强国家的可能性。对于中等债务能力，转型动态表现出地缘政治滞后性，主导地位由初始条件决定，除非战争爆发并引发霸权转移。对于高债务能力，转型动态表现出地缘政治脆弱性，债券市场预期驱动着主导地位不可预测的转变，并且即使没有战争也会发生霸权转移。
32775.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, POL；JEL：F51, F65, G15, H56

32760.title: Short-time Employment Aid During the Covid-19 Lockdown Short- and Long-run Effectiveness
32760.zh_title: 新冠封锁期间的短期就业援助：短期与长期有效性
32760.authors: Luca Salerno, Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Diana López-Falcón, Johannes Rausch
32760.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic led to significant economic disruptions, prompting many governments to implement short-time employment aid (STEA) to mitigate job losses and income reductions. This study examines the effectiveness of STEA in the short and long term in Europe among workers aged 50 and older, a part of the population that was especially threatened by the disease. Using data from the Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE), we analyze the impact of STEA on employment status, working hours, and income during and after the pandemic.
32760.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行导致了重大的经济混乱，促使许多政府实施短期就业援助以减少失业和收入下降。本研究考察了短期就业援助在欧洲50岁及以上工人中的短期和长期有效性，这一人群尤其受到该疾病的威胁。利用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查的数据，我们分析了短期就业援助在大流行期间及之后对就业状况、工作时间和收入的影响。
